common.connect_report_cases: Sign in to report cases, track their progress, and take action

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue to your dashboard

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.noAccountFound: No account found with this email

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.emailSent: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a reset link shortly

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Create a new password for your account

chatbot.greeting: Hello! 🐰💕 I'm Hope, your TounesHelp assistant! How can I help you today?

register.response:
To register on TounesHelp:
1. Click 'Sign up'
2. Fill in your details
3. Confirm your email
4. Start helping!

createCase.response:
To create a case:
1. Log in
2. Click 'Report a case'
3. Fill in the details
4. Add photos
5. Submit for review

activeCases.response: I can show real-time active case statistics. Ask: "stats" or "active cases".

help.response:
I can help you with:

💡 Platform information
📝 Registration and case creation
📊 Active case statistics
🔍 Search for specific cases
📍 Cases by governorate
🏥 Cases by category

Ask me a question!

chatbot.default: I'm Hope 🐰! I didn't understand. Try asking about 'registration', 'create a case', or 'active cases'.
